db.template:
!`opencode-db {{input}} --json`

The output above is from the opencode-db tool. Present the data clearly. If it's a list, format it as a table. Keep the response concise.
db.description: OpenCode database: list, info, stats, costs, search, etc. Usage: /db list --limit 5, /db info <id>, /db costs --total, /db stats

db-full.template:
!`opencode-db {{input}} --full --json`

The output above is from the opencode-db tool in full mode (no truncation). Present the data clearly.
db-full.description: Same as /db but with full output (no truncation). Usage: /db-full export --latest
